title: anneslea fragrans var. fragrans
intro: Anneslea fragrans var. fragrans, also known as the Starlight Tree or Anneslea, is a flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Asia, particularly in the Western Ghats of India. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues such as fever, headache, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Anneslea fragrans var. fragrans include its ability to reduce stress, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. In terms of herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of the plant are often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
